title: Vanilla Refreshed
description: Making Minecraft feel refreshed whilst keeping that vanilla feel
body:
**Enable all resource packs via Options -> Resource Packs for some mods to work**

I made this modpack make Minecraft feel refreshed (hence the name)

The major mods used are as followed:
Fresh Animations, Apple Skin, Better Third Person, Freecam, A couple shader packs, 2032 World height and FSit.

Those mods above are what (to me) are the most changing for the modpack compared to vanilla

**I also added Essential so now you can add friends and play with them in their singleplayer worlds :D**

**Updates may introduce more mods and/ or bug fixes**
(I also check through the modpack in a special world to make sure all the mods work)
